nearby: Bogagga ku saabsan mowduucyada ku dhow adiga
nearby-pages-desc: Waxay ku dartaa bogga gaarka ah ee [[Special:Nearby|Ku dhow]]
nearby-pages-error: {{SITENAME}} Ku Dhow waxaa ka jira dhibaatooyin.
nearby-pages-error-guidance: Isku day inaad dib u cusboonaysiiso goobtaada.
nearby-pages-noresults: Aamusnaan ayaa halkan ka jirta... Lama helin bogag leh mowduucyo ku dhow.
nearby-pages-noresults-guidance: Isku day inaad samayso bog cusub ama aad ku darto goob bog jira
nearby-pages-permission-denied: Waxaad diiday gelitaanka adeegyada goobta ee {{SITENAME}}. Si aad tan u beddesho, fadlan booqo dejimaha biraawsarkaaga ama qalabkaaga
nearby-pages-location-unavailable: {{SITENAME}} ma go'aamin karto goobtaada. Fadlan mar kale isku day adigoo leh xiriir ka wanaagsan.
nearby-pages-requirements: Waan ka xunnahay! Biraawsarkaaga web-ka ma taageerayo {{SITENAME}} Ku Dhow.
nearby-pages-requirements-guidance: Isku day biraawsar kale ama daar JavaScript haddii aad damisay.
nearby-pages-info-description: Waxaad akhrisan kartaa bogag xiiso leh oo {{SITENAME}} ah oo ku saabsan meelo kugu dhow
nearby-pages-info-show-random: Muuji bogag si aan kala sooc lahayn loo doortay
